reference: I am diabetic. My sugar levels after taking Gemer zero point five daily in the morning are ninety-five before food and one hundred and ten after food. Recently, I started having shoulder pain and was advised to take Lumia sixty,zero for four weeks, one tablet every week. I was also advised to take Nurokind LC twice daily. Kindly let me know if these treatments are safe.
text: I am diabetic. My sugar levels after taking Gemma zero point five daily in the morning and ninety five before food and one hundred and ten after food. Recently, I started having shoulder pain and was advised to take Neurokind LC twice daily. Kindly let me know if these treatments are safe.
